options.name: -aocv
options.description: Specifies the aocv libraries to include in the library set

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name for the library set being created

options.name: -si
options.description: Specifies cdB libraries and/or user-defined noise (UDN) models to include in the library set

options.name: -socv
options.description: Specifies the socv libraries to include in the library set

options.name: -timing
options.description: Specifies the timing libraries to include in the library set
